tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web with no API key. Default backend is DuckDuckGo's HTML endpoint (parsed via regex); pass `backend="searxng"` + `instance_url="https://searx.example"` to use a SearXNG instance instead. Returns up to `max_results` (default 10) hits, each {title, url, snippet}.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search query."},"max_results":{"type":"integer","description":"Max results to return (1-50, default 10)."},"backend":{"type":"string","enum":["duckduckgo","searxng"],"description":"Backend to use (default duckduckgo)."},"instance_url":{"type":"string","description":"SearXNG instance URL, required when backend=searxng."}},"required":["query"]}
